title: JMAP batch: no maxCallsInRequest limit enforced or advertised
description: handle_jmap_request iterates req.method_calls with no bound. Any authenticated caller can POST {methodCalls: [10000 calls]} and force 10k sequential DB operations. RFC 8620 §3.1 requires maxCallsInRequest in the core capability object and enforcement in the handler. Session object currently has empty {} for urn:ietf:params:jmap:core. Maintenance consequence: first user to hit this will file a performance issue; if the daemon is ever exposed beyond localhost, this becomes a DoS surface.
